terms.definition: The property that a notebook runs cleanly top-to-bottom from a fresh kernel and yields the same results for anyone.
A cell that produces the same result no matter how many times it's run, avoiding hidden cumulative state.
A tool that removes cell outputs from notebooks (often as a git filter) to keep diffs clean and avoid leaking results.
A tool that pairs a notebook with a plain-text .py representation for readable diffs and easier version control.
Moving stable notebook code into an importable .py module so it can be reused and tested.
